title: podman and buildah reporting different sizes for the same image
body:
/kind bug

```sh
# podman images
REPOSITORY                 TAG      IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE
docker.io/library/fedora   latest   9110ae7f579f   5 weeks ago   246MB
docker.io/library/centos   7        e934aafc2206   10 days ago   207MB

# buildah images
IMAGE ID             IMAGE NAME                                               CREATED AT             SIZE
9110ae7f579f         docker.io/library/fedora:latest                          Mar 7, 2018 17:51      234.7 MB
e934aafc2206         docker.io/library/centos:7                               Apr 6, 2018 18:01      197.6 MB
```

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:       0.4.1
Go Version:    go1.9.4
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info`:**

```
host:
  MemFree: 5660622848
  MemTotal: 16680030208
  SwapFree: 4294963200
  SwapTotal: 4294963200
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 4
  hostname: jw-laptop
  kernel: 4.15.16-300.fc27.x86_64
  os: linux
  uptime: 9h 43m 47.23s (Approximately 0.38 days)
insecure registries:
  registries: []
registries:
  registries:
  - docker.io
  - registry.fedoraproject.org
  - registry.access.redhat.com
store:
  ContainerStore:
    number: 4
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions:
  - overlay.override_kernel_check=true
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: extfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
  ImageStore:
    number: 2
  RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage

```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
```sh
# buildah version
Version:       0.16
Go Version:    go1.9.4
Image Spec:    1.0.0
Runtime Spec:  1.0.0
Git Commit:    82529cd
Built:         Wed Apr  4 11:22:14 2018
OS/Arch:       linux/amd64
```

comments.body: Being fixed in Buildah, turns out they use the wrong size for units (1024 vs 1000)
